title: Poké Pearls
description: Pokémon-themed pearls added to minecraft. Ender pearl and eye of ender's textures replaced with the classic cobblemon Azure Ball and Quick Ball textures respectively.
body:
Poké Pearls is a brand new resource pack focused on giving Minecraft a poké-themed vibe.
![The image shows the name of the texture pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a816a0a4f5bb266badaa2760c07cc71591a38f9.png)

The first changes added to the game are a modification of the ender pearl and eye of ender textures, replacing them with the classic cobblemon Azure Ball and Quick Ball textures.

![Textures changed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d9b12d4230b1add657eb82954f730122ac628fb.png)
